name: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company aims to identify and partner with a high-growth business in the technology sector. It is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
